subject: [PATCH v2 6/9] NFSD: check truncate permission under inode lock

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch addresses a timing issue in the NFS server where a client can extend a file before the server checks for truncation permission. The patch splits the write-count acquisition from the truncation permission check, ensuring that the correct size is used when checking for permission. This fix closes a TOCTOU window and prevents concurrent appends from extending the file before the server takes inode lock.
